tdeck.notes: WiFi cold-scan reliability fix and connect-dialog improvements. New map tools: drop a pin to navigate back to a saved spot, and show where the last mesh signal came from. JPG wallpaper support with large images and faster boot. Room server bug fixes.

m9.notes: WiFi cold-scan reliability fix and connect-dialog improvements. New map tools: drop a pin to navigate back to a saved spot, and show where the last mesh signal came from. JPG wallpaper support with large images and faster boot. Room server bug fixes.
